name: Interjection
scaffolding_intent: Displays a comic-style starburst with the problematic word from the child's speech, flagging grammatical or tense errors

parameters.name: word
parameters.description: Word or symbol displayed in the starburst

parameters.name: scale
parameters.description: Size multiplier for the interjection starburst

correction_intent: Child made a SEVERE grammatical error (e.g. wrong verb conjugation like 'he go' instead of 'he goes', wrong pronoun like 'him is' instead of 'he is', severely broken sentence structure). Do NOT flag missing articles, informal speech, sentence fragments, or minor stylistic issues — these are normal for children aged 5-8.
